name: Catit Dual Action Replacement Fountain Filter
shortDescription: Precisely formulated for adult indoor cats to support healthy weight and digestion.
description: Royal Canin Indoor Adult is specifically formulated for indoor cats aged 1–7 years. The formula helps manage weight, supports hairball elimination, and keeps your indoor cat's digestive system healthy with high-quality fibers.
features: Moderate fat content for indoor lifestyle
Enriched with antioxidants for immune health

reviews.title: Perfect for my indoor tabby
reviews.body: My cat's been on this for 3 years. Less hairballs, healthy weight, and she loves the taste.

name: Purina Pro Plan Savor Adult Salmon & Rice
shortDescription: High-protein dry cat food with real salmon as the #1 ingredient.
description: Purina Pro Plan Savor Adult features real salmon as the first ingredient, combined with rice for a nutritious, balanced meal. Fortified with live probiotics for digestive and immune health.
features: High protein to maintain lean muscle
Omega-6 fatty acids for shiny coat

name: From The Field Fresh Leaf & Flower Catnip
shortDescription: 72-inch tall cat tree with multiple perches, condo, and sisal scratching posts.
description: Give your cats the ultimate playground with this 72-inch tall cat tree. Features multiple levels, a cozy condo, two plush perches, and sisal-wrapped posts for healthy scratching. Sturdy base prevents tipping.
features: 72 inches tall — ideal for multiple cats

name: Tidy Cats Clumping Litter — Instant Action 35lb
shortDescription: Powerful clumping litter with instant odor control for multi-cat households.
description: Tidy Cats Instant Action clumping litter forms tight clumps for easy scooping and fights litter box odors instantly. 99.9% dust-free formula is ideal for multi-cat homes.

name: Yeowww! Catnip Banana Toy
shortDescription: Organic catnip-stuffed banana toy that drives cats wild.
description: Stuffed 100% with certified organic Yeowww! catnip, this iconic banana toy is one of the most popular cat toys ever made. Made in the USA from durable cotton twill.

name: Catit Pixi Fountain Cat Waterer Light Pink
shortDescription: Modern egg-shaped cat pod with removable washable cushion.
description: The Hepper Pod is a designer cat bed that blends into modern home décor. The enclosed design gives cats a secure, private hideaway. Features a removable, machine-washable inner cushion.
